sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collect_retentions (id_collect_retention INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, co_collect_retention VARCHAR(80), na_collect_retention VARCHAR(200), id_enterprise INTEGER);
description: Se crea la tabla 'collect_retentions' para almacenar retenciones de cobro por empresa.

sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collection_detail_retentions(id_collection_detail_retention INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, id_collection_detail INTEGER, id_collect_retention INTEGER, co_collect_retention VARCHAR(80), nu_amount_retention NUMERIC(29,4), nu_amount_retention_conversion NUMERIC(29,4), co_collection VARCHAR(30), posicion INTEGER, co_document VARCHAR(30));
description: Se crea la tabla 'collection_detail_retentions' para almacenar las retenciones seleccionadas por detalle de cobro.
